summary: SPK RC 27 sua triệt để goi NAS: worker runtime dung ngu canh SPK va native SQLite chay dung tren DSM x86_64.
changes: Resize logo 1024px thanh day du favicon 32px, favicon 256px, apple-touch-icon 180px va icon SPK 72px/256px de dong bo nhan dien tren web va DSM.
Sua logic progress proxy: chi hien loading khi thuc su con rendition dang xu ly; neu proxy da xong va khong con job chay thi an spinner dung nhu mong doi.
Thumbnail video/project duoc fallback tu frame video that tot hon, project khong co anh rieng se lay mot thumbnail ngau nhien on dinh tu source trong project.
Tang do phan hoi UI o cac thao tac dieu huong/mo modal chinh de giam cam giac tre khi bam.
Worker runtime diagnostics tu dong phan biet Docker va SPK, khong con hien huong dan sai ve container coopeditor-worker khi dang chay package DSM.
SPK x86_64 duoc va lai better-sqlite3 bang binary ELF Linux phu hop DSM de khong con loi invalid ELF header khi package khoi dong.
